select.if: SELECT ESNTL_ID AS uniqId , 'GNR' AS userSe , MBER_ID AS userId , MBER_NM AS userNm , MBER_EMAIL_ADRES AS email , MBTLNUM AS telno , ZIP AS zip , ADRES AS adres , DETAIL_ADRES AS detailAdres FROM TB_GNRL_MBER WHERE ESNTL_ID = #{uniqId}

SELECT ESNTL_ID AS uniqId , 'USR' AS userSe , EMPLYR_ID AS userId , USER_NM AS userNm , EMAIL_ADRES AS email , MBTLNUM AS telno , ZIP AS zip , HOUSE_ADRES AS adres , DETAIL_ADRES AS detailAdres FROM TB_EMPLYR_INFO WHERE ESNTL_ID = #{uniqId}

SELECT ESNTL_ID AS uniqId , 'ENT' AS userSe , ENTRPRS_MBER_ID AS userId , CMPNY_NM AS userNm , APPLCNT_EMAIL_ADRES AS email , TELNO AS telno , ZIP AS zip , ADRES AS adres , DETAIL_ADRES AS detailAdres FROM TB_ENTRPRS_MBER WHERE ESNTL_ID = #{uniqId}
